mcp__workspace__web_fetch returned a near-empty JS shell; escalated once to Claude-in-Chrome rendering, which surfaced Featured Items pricing and a Most Ordered omakase description. Nigiri and Today Special category tabs did not expand into itemized dish lists within the time box. manual_review_reason: Menu is a fixed omakase tasting structure (Omakase A $45 / Omakase B $79) plus a short list of a la carte items (A5 Wagyu, Salmon Don, Unagi Don, Chu Toro); no itemized course-by-course dish list or ingredient/allergen disclosures were available from the ordering platform within the time box. Nigiri and Today Special categories exist on the source but were not itemized.
